system.description: Saint George has recognized your good intentions and blessed you with a fragment of his holy power. Once per Scene, when you would suffer a Wound from a creature with monstrous, magical, or supernatural Descriptors, you can invoke the Saint's protection to reduce the damage. Roll 1 die: on a result of 4-6, you completely avoid the Wound; on 1-3, you still suffer it but gain 1 Additional Success on your next action against that creature. Additionally, you get 1 Additional Success on all Defense Checks against attacks from Dark Presences who serve the One Who Plots in the Shadows, as Saint George's blessing reveals their true nature.
system.requirement: Accumulate enough Judgment Tokens to prove your good intentions to Saint George, causing him to end any Witch Hunt and become a permanent ally.
system.notes: This Gift represents Saint George's acknowledgment that the Hunters are true heroes, not monsters. The 1 die roll (4-6 avoids Wound, 1-3 suffers but gets +1 next action) reflects the unpredictable nature of divine protection. The bonus against servants of the One Who Plots connects to Saint George's own manipulation—his blessing helps Hunters recognize and resist similar corruption. Saint George must have transitioned from Witch Hunt mode back to ally status for this Gift to be acquired. Once received, this Gift symbolizes Saint George's permanent trust and can even help him eventually discover his own manipulated past if Hunters share what they learn about the One Who Plots in the Shadows.
